summary: Low‑fidelity audience recording of a Dead soundcheck, plagued by hiss but offering a nostalgic feel.
review: The two reviews paint a mixed picture: one reviewer condemns the tape as noisy and essentially unusable, while another appreciates it as a rough glimpse into how the Dead sounded in rehearsal. The source appears to be an audience (Aud) capture with excessive hiss, making it difficult to enjoy musically but still of some archival interest.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief reviews with contradictory opinions; the recording is generally poor in fidelity, and there is no substantive musical performance to evaluate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Heavy hiss throughout, muffled sound, low clarity; not suitable for casual listening.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Soundcheck material only – no full set structure to assess.
